architecture.summary: 6 surgical fixes to existing GitHub sync pipeline. No new architecture — session caches, guard inversions, and one GraphQL combined fetch.

integrations.summary: All changes in GitHub integration layer. JIRA/ADO unaffected. No auth changes — keeps gh CLI compatibility.

ui-ux.summary: N/A — CLI tool, no UI. Sync output unchanged.

performance.summary: Core goal: reduce ~150 API calls per 7-US increment to ~75. Eliminates redundant label creation, milestone lookups, duplicate searches, sequential fetches.

security.summary: No auth changes. Never caches DuplicateDetector search results. Never removes sync lock.

edge-cases.summary: Phase 3 dedup verification opt-in via SPECWEAVE_VERIFY_DUPLICATES=1 for concurrent environments. Label cache scoped per repo. Milestone cache scoped per session.
